issue_summary: Allow supplying KnnSearchStrategy to vector similarity queries
javadoc_before:
/**
 * Search for all (approximate) vectors above a similarity threshold using {@link
 * VectorSimilarityCollector}.
 *
 * @lucene.experimental
 */
javadoc_after:
/** * Search for all (approximate) vectors above a similarity threshold using {@link * VectorSimilarityCollector}. * *

This class is package-private by design; callers construct one of the concrete public * subclasses ({@link FloatVectorSimilarityQuery} or {@link ByteVectorSimilarityQuery}), which * inherit shared public API such as {@link #getSearchStrategy()}. This mirrors the visibility * pattern of {@link AbstractKnnVectorQuery}. * * @lucene.experimental */
